hero.subtitle: A quiet floor to hold your thoughts, and a lively one to spark your night. Pick your vibe, and let the first sip do the rest.

about.description: At mazaaj, we craft an experience that fits every detail of your day. With outstanding service and quality we take pride in, we bring you a captivating blend of specialty coffee and refreshing drinks. Whether you're seeking calm and comfort on our VIP floor, or crave the excitement of game nights and match days on our games floor, we're always here to set your mood — with passion.

menuPreview.title: Flavors For Every Mood
menuPreview.description: Specialty coffee, premium desserts, and shisha in a variety of flavors — all waiting for you.

gameLounge.title: Game Lounge
gameLounge.description: Head upstairs to a whole different world — a fully equipped game lounge for a great time with your friends, alongside the same relaxed atmosphere and top-notch service.

delivery.title: Your Mood, Delivered
delivery.description: Your favorite coffee, desserts, and shisha — order from wherever you are and we'll deliver in no time.

contact.title: Visit Us or Follow Along
contact.address: Al Anbar - Ramadi - Haji Ziyad Roundabout - beginning of Omar Street
contact.hours: Daily 10 AM - 1 AM, Friday 2 PM - 2 AM
